suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on how to handle features that are blocked by environment constraints (cursor-agent not authenticated). Consider a convention for marking such features as 'blocked' vs 'completed' status to make the distinction clearer.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature end-to-end-test is status='completed' but OVERRIDDEN due to cursor-agent auth. VAL-CROSS-001/VAL-CROSS-002 remain unverified.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that verificationSteps should match what was actually done, not what was planned. Workers should update verificationSteps to reflect actual execution or note deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: end-to-end-test verificationSteps mention 'Execute full flow manually or via test script' but worker ran individual curl commands instead.

rejectedObservations.observation: 3 timeout failures in plugin-tools-hook.test.ts should perhaps be skipped
rejectedObservations.reason: In current test run, these tests are already properly skipped (5 tests skipped, 0 failures). This was addressed in earlier fix-feature 'fix-plugin-tests'.
